contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Reconcile 93 stale pending_review rows in Email Agent Drafts
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/205
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/108
  
  Details:
  Operator hit /warmup_review.html and saw only 2 drafts when expecting more. Diagnostic showed 76 pending_review/AI/Warm-up + 17 pending_review/AI/Follow-up rows whose gmail_message_id was already logged in Email Agent Follow Up — they were sent yesterday but Email Agent Drafts row status hadn't been flipped from pending_review to a terminal state. GAS filter was correctly hiding them as ghosts (sentManual: 93), but the underlying sheet was inconsistent.
  
  One-off live reconcile (no PR — direct sheet edit): walked Email Agent Drafts, flipped status pending_review -> sent for any row whose gmail_message_id appears in Email Agent Follow Up. 93 rows fixed (76 warm-up + 17 follow-up), 0 errors. Verified via GAS endpoint: skipped.sentManual now 0, counts unchanged (2 genuinely unsent follow-ups remain).
  
  Root cause: sync_email_agent_followup.py flips Gmail labels (review -> sent) when logging sent messages but never flips the matching Email Agent Drafts row's status field. The reconcile path only runs from suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py main flow which hadn't fired today. Recommended follow-up: patch sync_email_agent_followup.py to flip the row status too, so this drift doesn't recur. Pairs with the diagnostic + label-fix PRs today (dapp #205 + go_to_market #108).
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 33.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
